raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Assembly Bill 608 aims to save money for local governments and small business owners.",
    "The taxes generated from small businesses are often less than the cost of assessing and collecting those same taxes.",
    "AB 608 is designed to eliminate government waste and inefficiency.",
    "AB 608 has received bipartisan support in the legislature.",
    "AB 608 helps reduce the tax burden on many businesses.",
    "AB 608 aims to free resources for the County of Orange Assessor’s Office and County Assessor departments statewide.",
    "AB 608 increases efficiency and utilizes taxpayer money more effectively.",
    "AB 608 provides businesses with much-needed tax relief.",
    "The current low-value ordinance exemption threshold is considered too low by County Assessors.",
    "Assessing possessory interests is time-consuming and may cost local governments more than the revenue generated.",
    "AB 608 rationalizes existing law governing low-value ordinance exemptions."
  ]
}
```
